bird.name: Verreaux's eagle
bird.summary: Verreaux's eagle (; Aquila verreauxii) is a large, mostly African, bird of prey. It is also called the black eagle, especially in southern…

locations.name: 乌干达
locations.summary: 烏干達共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Uganda，英語：Republic of Uganda），通稱烏干達，是位於東非的內陸國家。 烏干達名稱來自於過去班圖人建立的布干達王國。歐洲列強在十九世紀後葉進入東非內陸後，烏干達在18…

locations.name: 肯尼亚
locations.summary: 肯亞共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Kenya；英語：Republic of Kenya），通稱肯亞（Kenya），是位於東非，濒临印度洋，與索馬里、埃塞俄比亚、南蘇丹、烏干達、坦桑尼亚接壤，面积约58万平方公里。肯亞人口约52…

locations.name: 刚果民主共和国
locations.summary: 剛果民主共和國（法語：République démocratique du Congo，簡寫為RDC）是位於非洲中部的國家，簡稱民主剛果（RD Congo）、剛果（金）（Congo-Kinshasa）。國家的陸地面積約234.5萬平方公里…

locations.name: 坦桑尼亚
locations.summary: 坦桑尼亚联合共和国（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Muungano wa Tanzania；英語：United Republic of Tanzania），通稱坦尚尼亞（斯瓦希里語和英語：Tanzania），是位于赤道以南的东非国家。…

locations.name: 马拉维
locations.summary: 马拉维共和国（英語：Republic of Malawi；齊切瓦語：Dziko la Malaŵi），通稱馬拉威（齊切瓦語：Malaŵi；英語：Malawi），是一個位於非洲東南部的內陸國家，鄰接贊比亞、莫桑比克及坦桑尼亞。國土位於南緯9…

locations.name: 尼卡高原
locations.summary: 尼卡高原（英语：Nyika Plateau）是马拉维北部的一个高原，小部分位于赞比亚东部，高原平均海拔高度约为2100至2200米，最高处为海拔2605米的恩甘达山。高原呈钻石形，南北轴和东西轴分别长约90和50千米。高原之下有马拉维湖（…

locations.name: Mafinga Hills
locations.summary: The Mafinga Hills are a plateau covered by hills, situated on the border between Zambia and Malawi, in Southern Africa.

relations.subject: Verreaux's eagle
relations.evidence: Published by Christopher Helm, London. possibly some mountains in northeastern Uganda, Kenya, easternmost Democratic Republic of the Congo and possibly Tanzania. Southeastern Africa is the heart of the Verreaux's eagle range: they are found in most mountain ranges in Malawi but for the Nyika Plateau, the Mafinga Hills and the Lulwe Hills,Dowsett-Lemaire, F

relations.subject: Verreaux's eagle
relations.evidence: It lives in kopjes, which are dry, rocky environments in anything from rocky hills to high mountains amongst cliffs, gorges and inselbergs often surrounded by savanna, thornbush and sub-desert. It is often found in dry areas with less than of average annual rainfall
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.subject: Verreaux's eagle
relations.evidence: It lives in kopjes, which are dry, rocky environments in anything from rocky hills to high mountains amongst cliffs, gorges and inselbergs often surrounded by savanna, thornbush and sub-desert. It is often found in dry areas with less than of average annual rainfall
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Verreaux's eagle
relations.evidence: In Walter Sisulu National Botanical Garden in South Africa, despite an appreciable decline in rock hyrax populations, breeding data revealed few changes in the incubation period, nestling period and post-fledging dispersal period in two known pairs of the eagles. At this same site, despite it being one of the most popular nature areas in metropolitan Johannesburg, high levels of human activity have had no apparent adverse effect on the eagles' breeding behaviour (by contrast, when exposed to similar levels of disturbance, golden eagles have been shown to temporarily abandon their nests).Simmons, R., Rodrigues, L., Woodcock, L., Steyn, P
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
